ideas.intro: Ideas for projects, activities, books, games, and more for students with a high level of interest.

items.content:
[ ] Explore ideas throughout the rest of The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering. Apply them where appropriate.
[ ] Create a poster and frame it to decorate your room or give as a gift.
[ ] Use your lettering skills to make birthday, thank you, and other cards for loved ones. 
[ ] Make placecards for and host a dinner party.

[ ] Use your lettering skills to make Christmas or New Year cards.
[ ] Do a painting of your home, and use script to write the address on it.
[ ] Write a letter to a friend. Include a neatly arranged quote as a gift.

[ ] Make a list of all of the things you want to do over summer vacation in a neat lettering style. Post it in your room.
[ ] Draw a message in chalk on your driveway to bless your neighbors.
[ ] Create and deliver a card to someone you know living alone or in an assisted-living facility.
